_comment: Source registry for the xAID trending-news pipeline. method: how to ingest. curl-rss = plain curl on the feed works; webfetch = Cloudflare/bot-blocked, use WebFetch tool; websearch = no stable feed, discover via WebSearch. Verified live 2026-07-02.

sources.name: Radiology Business
sources.notes: Workhorse. Homepage 403s bots but the feed is open. ~100 fresh items, updated daily. Most on-topic for xAID.

sources.name: MedTech Dive
sources.notes: Fresh daily. Broad medtech; filter for imaging/radiology/AI-diagnostics relevance.

sources.name: AuntMinnie Industry News
sources.notes: curl gets 403 (Cloudflare JS challenge). WebFetch renders it. Daily, free. Consider FeedSpot/proxy if WebFetch flakes.

sources.name: Crunchbase News (health)
sources.notes: General feed works but is not health-specific; filter items to health/medtech, or find the health-section/tag feed. Use WebSearch as backstop for health rounds.

sources.name: PE Stakeholder Project
sources.notes: No RSS found. WebFetch the news page. Good for PE-consolidation angles that tie to radiology group economics.

sources.name: ITN Online
sources.notes: Feed works but lagged (latest ~May). Low priority; mostly vendor product news.

sources.name: ACR News & Bulletin
sources.notes: Bulletin free; JACR journal paywalled. Good for policy/guideline angles.

sources.name: Substack (rad-AI publications)
sources.notes: Every Substack has /feed. Need Anastasia to name the publications worth tracking.

sources.name: Lovable news aggregator
sources.page: PENDING - need public deployed URL (link given was the editor)
sources.notes: Anastasia said news is collected here. The lovable.dev/projects/... link is the editor and only returns the header. Need the deployed app URL or an export/API.
